name: Influencer Marketing Tracker
description: Influencer Marketing Tracker - Marketing template for channels professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE Step 1: Build Your Influencer Database Start by researching and adding potential influencers. Record their platform, niche, follower count, engagement rate, and contact info. Use the Tier system (Mega/Macro/Mid/Micro/Nano) to categorise. Step 2: Plan Your Campaigns For each influencer campaign, create a brief in the Campaign Planner. Define objectives, target audience, key messages, deliverables, timeline, and budget.
